scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --prefix backend && npm run format:check --prefix frontend
scripts.format:fix: npm run format:fix --prefix backend && npm run format:fix --prefix frontend
scripts.lint:check: npm run lint:check --prefix backend && npm run lint:check --prefix frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --prefix backend && npm run lint:fix --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
